titleStmt.title: SII 8.336: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 336. (A.R. No. 61 of 1903). ON THE EAST WALL OF THE THIRD PRAKARA OF THE SIVA TEMPLE AT JAMBUKESVARAM, TRICHINOPOLY TALUK, TRICHINOPOLY DISTRICT.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . . tribhuvanaccakravat=tikaḷ śrirācarācatevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10vatu tulānāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu tritiyaiyum putaṉkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa punarpūcattu nāḷ pāṇṭikulācaṉivaḷanāṭṭu viḷānāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tiruvāṉaikkāvuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyil Āticaṇṭeśvaratevar ka
ṉmikaḷukku rācarācavaḷanāṭṭup pācciṟkūṟṟattu kiḻpalāṟṟuk kāricāttaṉkuṟaiyiṟ kāṇiUṭaiya Oṭamuṭaiyāril pollātāṉ celvanāṉa poṉṉimaḻai nāṭāḻvāṉum Uṭaiyāṉ nañcuṇṭiyāṉa neṟkuppai Araiyaṉuṅ kuṉṟaṉ cikaiyilāyamuṭaiyāṉāṉa tiruvaraṅkanāṭāḻ
vāṉum Immuvom nila vilaipramāṇa Icaivutiṭṭu Iṟṟaināḷāl nāṅkaḷ viṟṟukkuṭutta nilamum maṉaiyumāvatu . Ikkāricāttaṉkuṟaikku nnāṉkellaiyāvatu kiḻpāṟkellai Icaṇaikkuṟai Ellaikku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai
Innāyaṉār tevatāṉam tirunāmattukkāṇi Apputikuṟaikku vaṭakkum ciṟṟāṟṟukku vaṭakku mipāṟkellai Iv Apputikuṟai Ellaikkuk kiḻakkum Ellai Āṟṟu niroṭu kālukku teṟkkum Āka Icainta perunāṉkellai yuḷpaṭṭa nilattāṟ paṅku 10 2
Ippaṅku panniraṇṭil Eṅkaḷukkuk kiṟamākatamāy varukiṟa paṅku 4 Ippaṅku nālāl vanta puṉceyyum maṉaiyum maṉaippaṭaippaiyum potuvum potāriyum maṉṟuṅ kaṉṟunilai pāḻum meṉokkiṉa maramuṅ kiḻnokkiṉa kiṇaṟum maṟṟum Epperpaṭṭa Urimaikaḷum Uṭpaṭṭa
nilattu Ivvūr Aiyyanār kuṉṟavaḷanāṭar cikoyilun tirumuṟṟamum Uḷḷiṭṭa nilattu Ippaṅkopāti 1/40 Innilam Araimāvum nikki nikki niṉṟa Epperpaṭṭa Urimaikaḷum Akappaṭa viṟṟukkuṭuttuk koḷvatāṉa Emmilicainta vilaipporuḷ Aṉṟāṭu naṟkācu 4 1000 Ikkācu nālāyiramu
m Āvaṇakkaḷariye kāṭṭeṟṟik kaiccela vaṟakkoṇṭu viṟṟu vilaipramāṇa Icaivutiṭṭuk kuṭuttom Uṭaiyār tiruvāṉaikkāvuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyil Āticaṇṭeśvaratevar kaṉmikaḷukkup pollātāṉ celvanāṉa poṉṉimaḻai nāṭāḻvāṉum Uṭaiyāṉ nañcuṇṭāṉāṉa ne
ṟkuppai Araiyaṉum kuṉṟaṉ cikaiyilāyamuṭaiyāṉ tiruvaraṅkanāṭāḻvāṉum Immuvarom . Ippaṅku nālum Ittāl vanta puṉceyyum maṉai maṉaippaṭappaiyum Āṟum Āṟiṭu paṭukaiyum potuvum potāriyum maṉṟuṅ kaṉṟu nilaipāḻum meṉokkiṉa maramuṅ kiḻnokkiṉa kiṇaṟu muṭpaṭṭa I
kkācu nālāyiramum vilaiyāvutākavum Ituve poruḷmāvaṟitip poruṭcelavolaiyāvutākavum Ituvallatu veṟu poruḷmāvaṟitip poruṭcelavolai kāṭṭakaṭa vatallātatākavum Ippaṭi cammatittu vilaikkaṟaviṟṟup poru ḷaṟakkoṇṭuviṟṟu vilaipramāṇaṁIcaivutiṭṭuk kuṭut
teom . Ippaṅku nālāl vanta puṉcey nilattukkum maṉaikkum Āṟum Āṟiṭupaṭukaikkum maṟṟum Epperppaṭṭa Urimaikaḷukkum Ivar veṇṭi pramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭukkak kaṭavomākavum kuṭuttilomākil Inta pramāṇa Icaivutiṭṭe pramāṇamāvutākavum Ippaṭi camma
tittu nila vilaipramāṇa Icaivutiṭṭuk kuṭuttom Uṭaiyār tiruvāṉaikkāvuṭaiya nāyaṉārkoyil Āticaṇṭeśvara tevar kaṉmikaḷukku pollātān celvanāna poṉṉimaḻanāṭāḻvāṉum Uṭaiyāṉ nañcuṇṭāṉāṉa neṟkuppaiaraiyaṉum kuṉṟaṉ cikayilāyamuṭaiyāṉ ti
ruvaraṅkanāṭāḻvāṉum Immuvom . Ippiramāṇa Icaivutiṭṭu Eḻutiṉeṉ Ivūr madhyastaṉ māmaṅkalamuṭaiyāṉ kaḻumalaviṭaṅka ṉeḻuttu . Itu kuṉṟaṉ cikaiyilāyamuṭaiyāṉāṉa tiruvaraṅkanāṭāḻvāṉ sayiñaiĀṉamaikku Ivai ciṟutavūrk kāṇiUṭaiya toṟṟuṭaiyā ṉeḻuttu .
Itu Uṭaiyāṉ nañcuṇṭāṉāṉa neṟkuppaiaraiyaṉ cayiññānataṉamaikku tirukkarampantuṟaiUṭaiya nāyaṉār koyilk kāṇiUṭaiya civappirāmaṇaṉ muttaṉāṉa pollātāṉ celvaṉāṉa poṉṉimaḻaināṭāḻvāṉ cayiññātaṉamaikku putukkuṭiyāṉa rācentiracoḻamaṅkalattu kāvalkkāṇi
Uṭaiya perumāṉ Aḻakaṉāṉa maṇavāḷamuttaraiyaṉ Eḻuttu . Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ Uttamanampi Eḻuttu . Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ tuṟaiyūruṭaiyāṉ vaṭakaraināṭṭu muventa Aṟiveṉ kemutavaṉ Āḷumpirāṉ periyakoyilnampi Eḻuttu . Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ Ālaṅkuṭaiyāṉ miṉavaṉ pallavaraiyaṉeṉ . Ippaṭi Aṟi
veṉ tukkuṭi tiruvāykkulamuṭaiyāṉ śrīnāraciṅkapaṭṭaṉeṉ . Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ civaññāṉakkuṟai kavuciyaṉ tillaippirāṉ Āṇṭāṉ cattivaṉapperumāṉ Eḻuttu . kuṟai vikkiramacoḻanallūruṭaiyāṉ viḷānāṭṭuveḷāṉ Eḻuttu . Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ nālūr periyāḻvāṉ Ākamarāyaṉeṉ . Ippaṭi
Aṟiveṉ Uṭaiyār tiruvāṉaikkāvuṭaiyanāyaṉār tevatāṉam tirunāmattukkāṇi kiḻāṟṟūr pūvālacuntaraviṇṇakar Emaperumāṉ koyil tiruvaṭippi ḻuttu . Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ Icaṇaikkuṟai Uṭaiyāṉ tillaināyakaṉāṉa cemmaiyāṇṭāṉeṉ
Digital edition of SII 8.336 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
